nasb.text: “Behold, as for the proud one, His soul is not right within him; But the righteous will live by his faith.

esv.text: “Behold, his soul is puffed up; it is not upright within him, but the righteous shall live by his faith.

cnv.text: 迦勒底人自高自大，心不正直； 然而義人必因信得生。

ccb.text: 看那骄傲之人，他们心术不正， 但义人必靠信心而活。
